Provenance.drafts: 4 candidates generated locally via ComfyUI MCP (single pass, no escalation needed); curated per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: c3 (seed+3) -- the only one of the 4 to show literal crossed miner's pickaxes over a dark ore vein, framed as a heraldic crest; accepted despite an unusual wavy-banner frame shape. c0 and c1 drew generic fantasy amulet crests with no pickaxe motif; c2 drew a crossed-hammer/blade crest closer in spirit but still not pickaxes.
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse, background-removed via BiRefNet (cutout.py --trim); no normal map (flat icon per AssetSpec.NormalMap=false).
